# Copilot Instructions

## General Guidelines
- Provide guidance in Bangla for better understanding.
- Offer very simple, beginner-friendly instructions.
- Break down tasks into step-by-step processes, addressing one task at a time.
- Ensure full details are included with no skipped steps.

## Code Style
- Use specific formatting rules.
- Follow naming conventions.

## Project-Specific Rules
- Custom requirement A.
- Custom requirement B.
